title: spergularia rubra subsp. diandra
intro: Spergularia rubra subsp. diandra, also known as pink sandwort, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Spergularia rubra subsp. diandra include its ability to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those seeking natural relief.
